parameters.query:
-- Métricas completas por vendedor na última semana
SELECT
  v.id                    AS vendedor_id,
  v.nome                  AS vendedor_nome,
  count(c.id)             AS total_conversas,
  count(c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.resultado = 'converteu')  AS conversoes,
  count(c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.resultado = 'perdeu')     AS perdas,
  count(c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.resultado = 'pendente')   AS pendentes,
  round(avg(c.score_qualidade)::numeric, 2)             AS score_medio,
  round(
    100.0 * count(c.id) FILTER (WHERE c.resultado = 'converteu')
    / NULLIF(count(c.id), 0), 2
  )                       AS taxa_conversao,
  -- Comparativo semana anterior
  (
    SELECT round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE resultado = 'converteu') / NULLIF(count(*),0), 2)
    FROM ml_comercial.conversas
    WHERE vendedor_id = v.id
      AND created_at BETWEEN NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days' AND NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  )                       AS taxa_conversao_semana_anterior,
  p.pontos_fortes         AS perfil_pontos_fortes,
  p.gaps                  AS perfil_gaps,
  p.recomendacoes         AS perfil_recomendacoes,
  -- Top objeções da semana por vendedor
  (
    SELECT json_agg(o ORDER BY freq DESC) FROM (
      SELECT
        ob.tipo_objecao::text,
        ob.texto_objecao,
        count(*) AS freq,
        ob.respostas_validadas
      FROM ml_comercial.objecoes ob
      WHERE c2.id = ANY(ob.conversas_origem)
      GROUP BY ob.tipo_objecao, ob.texto_objecao, ob.respostas_validadas
      LIMIT 3
    ) o
    FROM ml_comercial.conversas c2
    WHERE c2.vendedor_id = v.id
      AND c2.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  )                       AS top_objecoes
FROM ml_comercial.vendedores v
JOIN ml_comercial.conversas c
  ON c.vendedor_id = v.id
  AND c.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
LEFT JOIN ml_comercial.perfis_vendedor p ON p.vendedor_id = v.id
WHERE v.ativo = true
GROUP BY v.id, v.nome, p.pontos_fortes, p.gaps, p.recomendacoes
ORDER BY taxa_conversao DESC NULLS LAST;

parameters.name: body

nodes.name: Claude Sonnet — Gerar Insights
nodes.notes: [ML-COMERCIAL] performance-reporter — insights gerenciais via Claude Sonnet

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO ml_comercial.relatorios_performance (
  vendedor_id,
  periodo_inicio,
  periodo_fim,
  tipo_relatorio,
  score_geral,
  taxa_conversao,
  tendencia,
  top_insights,
  recomendacoes,
  alertas,
  metricas_detalhe
) VALUES (
  $1::uuid,
  $2::date,
  $3::date,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  $7,
  $8::jsonb,
  $9::jsonb,
  $10::jsonb,
  $11::jsonb
)
RETURNING id;

meta.description: Relatório semanal de performance — insights gerenciais via Claude Sonnet, toda segunda-feira
